hero.title: Sokołek Studio
hero.subtitle: Technology that makes sense.
hero.description: We are an independent technology studio from Poznań, bringing engineering and creativity together. We help companies improve the way they work with knowledge, documents and repetitive processes by designing AI systems, automations and digital products. We work from problem discovery and prototyping through to secure solutions ready for everyday use. When a project calls for it, we bring technology together with UX, communication, branding and web design.

services.label: Services
services.heading: Small studio. Full attention.
services.description: Your brand, website, technology and communication should all speak with one voice. That is why we look at the business as a whole and shape the scope around what it genuinely needs — from the first idea to a solution ready for everyday use.

items.title: Process Audit & AI Strategy
items.description: We identify where AI or automation can genuinely make a difference. We examine your company's processes, knowledge and goals, then structure the ideas, prioritise the most promising directions and prepare a concrete plan for a pilot or full implementation.

items.title: AI Systems & Automation
items.description: We build tools that simplify working with documents, knowledge and repetitive processes. We design them end to end — from the prototype and integration with data and existing tools to a secure system ready for everyday use.

items.title: Digital Foundation
items.description: Build your brand from the ground up with us — from positioning and visual identity to your website and one key technology implementation. We bring it all together into a coherent digital foundation that supports the next stage of your company's growth.

items.title: Brand & Web
items.description: We design refined brands, websites and digital products that look and sound like your business. From strategy and identity to UX/UI, development and tone of voice.

targetAudience.label: Who we help
targetAudience.heading: For companies with a lot of knowledge, documents and manual work.
targetAudience.description: We are at our best in organisations where important information is scattered, experts lose time to repetitive tasks and existing tools no longer keep up with the company's growth. We do not implement technology for the sake of it — we look for solutions that genuinely make everyday work easier and support the team as it develops.

items.title: Working with documents takes too much time
items.description: The team spends its time searching, comparing and re-entering information instead of using its expertise to work with clients, projects and decisions.

items.title: Knowledge is scattered across people and tools
items.description: The most important information lives in emails, files, conversations and the heads of a few key people, making it difficult to find, share and use effectively.

items.title: Repetitive processes are holding back growth
items.description: The company is growing, but part of the work still depends on manual follow-ups, copying data and repeating the same steps for every new project.

items.title: The business needs a new digital foundation
items.description: The brand, website, communication and tools no longer reflect where the company is heading or the experience its clients and team now expect.

process.label: Process
process.heading: From an idea to a working solution.
process.description: First, we work together to understand what you actually need. Then we test the idea on a small scale before building a solution that can work reliably in the day-to-day rhythm of the business.

items.title: Discovery
items.description: We get to know the company, its people, data and processes. We look for the point where technology can create real value.

items.title: Prototype
items.description: We test the most important assumptions within a concrete, limited scope before the solution grows to production scale.

items.title: Implementation
items.description: We build the system, connect it with existing tools and take care of usability, security and reliable performance.

items.title: Development
items.description: We observe how the solution performs in practice, improve it and adapt it to the changing needs of the company and its team.

philosophy.label: Our approach
philosophy.heading: Technology where it makes sense.
philosophy.description: We use new technologies responsibly and only where they are genuinely needed. We do not treat them as an end in themselves or as a shortcut to replacing people. We design solutions that take repetitive work off teams' plates, organise knowledge and support better decision-making. This gives people more time for work that requires experience, creativity, judgement and human connection.

engineeringFoundation.label: Engineering foundation
engineeringFoundation.note: Selected professional experience of the studio's co-founder.
engineeringFoundation.heading: Experience you can rely on.
engineeringFoundation.description: Maksymilian leads the technology side of Sokołek Studio. He is a senior software engineer with more than six years of experience building AI systems, web applications and cloud architecture. He has designed and delivered solutions from early prototypes to production systems for startups and global companies across healthcare, chemicals, advertising, semiconductors and finance.

pillars.title: AI Platform for Medical Documentation
pillars.outcome: Designed and built an application for working with medical documentation and knowledge — from cloud architecture and AI model integration to the user interface and deployment process.

pillars.title: AI Agent System for the Advertising Industry
pillars.outcome: Built an agentic system that plans and executes multi-step tasks, works with multiple AI models and passes structured outputs between services.

pillars.title: MLOps Infrastructure for the Semiconductor Industry
pillars.outcome: Designed and implemented a production MLOps environment built on Kubernetes, standardising the way machine learning models were developed and deployed across a global engineering organisation.

pillars.title: Data Architecture for the Banking Sector
pillars.outcome: Built data systems that analysed information and supported the maintenance of a global ATM infrastructure.

pillars.title: Knowledge Platform for the Chemical Industry
pillars.outcome: Designed a platform that processed approximately 100,000 technical PDF documents, structured the data they contained and prepared it for search and use by AI-powered tools.

portfolio.label: Selected work
portfolio.heading: Projects we are proud of.
portfolio.intro: We do our best work with people who truly know and care about what they do. For them, we create solutions where strategy, technology, visuals and language work as one.

dogTok.title: DOG TOK
dogTok.subtitle: DOG TOK — Szkoleniowy Raj
dogTok.summary: We transformed DOG TOK's extensive offering into a simple, easy-to-navigate structure. We designed a website that captures the atmosphere of the place, makes essential information easy to find and guides visitors through workshops, camps, accommodation and the events calendar.
dogTok.imageAlt: The DOG TOK — Szkoleniowy Raj website, designed and developed by Sokołek Studio

midPageCta.label: Next step
midPageCta.heading: Does one of your processes take up too much of your team's time?
midPageCta.description: You do not need to know how to automate it or whether AI is the right solution. Tell us how it works today. We will help you define the problem, find a sensible direction and decide what is genuinely worth building.

sectionOne.heading: A little about us
sectionOne.description: Maksymilian leads the technology side of the studio. He has spent years building software and AI systems for startups and large organisations. He combines engineering experience with a strong curiosity for new technologies, but never implements them for the sake of novelty. He values simple solutions, clean code and projects refined down to the last detail.

sectionTwo.description: Klaudia leads the creative side of the studio. She combines experience in PR and communication with UX, photography, video editing and social media. She has a strong eye for visuals, a feel for trends and knows how to translate the character of a brand and complex technology into clear, natural language. She makes sure the whole experience is coherent, useful and simply looks right.

openScope.heading: We bring technology, design and communication together.
openScope.description: We do not start with a list of services or a predetermined technology. First, we understand the company's situation. Then we shape the scope around solving a specific problem and achieving a meaningful result.

contact.description: Tell us about a process that takes too much time, knowledge that is difficult to find or a digital solution that no longer keeps up with your company's growth. We will help you make sense of the situation and decide what the next step should be.
contact.secondaryDescription: If you need a new brand, website or a complete Digital Foundation, we can bring design, technology and communication together in one coherent solution.

cookieConsent.label: Cookies
cookieConsent.heading: We use analytics cookies.
cookieConsent.description: We use Google Analytics to better understand how visitors use our website and how we can improve it.
